## Release impact

- [ ] No production release is required.
- [ ] A production release is appropriate after this PR is approved and merged.

## Author checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and contains no unrelated modifications.
- [ ] New or changed behavior has appropriate tests.
- [ ] Existing behavior and backward compatibility were checked.
- [ ] Flake8 and relevant tests pass, or failures are explained above.
- [ ] No secrets, generated artifacts, unpublished data, or private URLs are included.
- [ ] Codex review findings have been resolved or answered.
- [ ] The pull request is ready for final human review.
